# HermesWorkspace — Full LLM Context

> Last updated: 2025-05-31
> Source: https://hermesworkspace.com/llms-full.txt

---

## Company Overview

**HermesWorkspace** is a B2B SaaS platform for educational institutions in India. It provides an all-in-one school management and communication platform that replaces the fragmented combination of WhatsApp groups, SMS broadcasts, email chains, and offline notice boards that most Indian schools currently rely on.

Founded in 2024 by Apurav Agarwal and Lakshya Kumar in Ranchi, Jharkhand, HermesWorkspace was built to solve institutional communication chaos in Indian K–12 schools.

**Website:** https://hermesworkspace.com  
**Support:** support@hermesworkspace.com  
**Partnerships:** connect@hermesworkspace.com  

---

## The Problem HermesWorkspace Solves

Indian schools face a fragmented communication problem:
- Principals broadcast notices on WhatsApp groups (no delivery tracking, no role separation)
- Teachers use personal WhatsApp numbers to communicate with students and parents
- PTMs are coordinated via paper notes and informal calls
- Attendance, exam schedules, and fee reminders go through different apps or papers
- There is no single source of truth for institutional communication

HermesWorkspace consolidates all of this into one platform with proper role-based access, structured channels, and institutional-grade reliability.

---

## Core Features

### 1. Live HD Classes
- HD quality with low latency
- Up to concurrent sessions per institution
- Up to 150 students per session
- Automatic attendance tracking
- Session recording available

### 2. Institutional Messaging
- Role-based channels: Admin → Teachers, Teachers → Students, Parent–Teacher, All-school
- Structured workspaces per class, department, or subject
- Read receipts and delivery status
- File sharing and multimedia support
- No personal phone numbers exposed

### 3. Digital Notice Board
- Push announcements to entire school, specific classes, or departments
- Delivery tracking (who read the notice)
- Priority levels (normal, important, critical)
- Scheduled publishing

### 4. Meeting Scheduler
- PTM (Parent-Teacher Meeting) scheduling
- Staff meeting coordination
- Board reviews and administrative sessions
- Calendar integration
- Automated reminders

### 5. Webinars
- Large-scale sessions for career guidance, parent orientations, guest lectures
- Registration and attendance tracking
- Session recordings
- Q&A features

### 6. Member Management
- Bulk import via Excel/CSV
- Role-based access: Administrator, Teacher, Student, Parent
- Department and class assignment
- Alumni tracking
- Profile management

### 7. School Analytics
- Real-time activity dashboard for principals
- Attendance rates
- Engagement metrics
- Communication statistics
- Report generation

---

## Pricing

HermesWorkspace operates on an institutional subscription model. A free demo is available for all qualifying educational institutions. Contact connect@hermesworkspace.com for pricing specific to your school's size and requirements.

---

## Technology & Security

- Cloud-hosted on scalable infrastructure
- Role-based access control (RBAC)
- DPDPA (Digital Personal Data Protection Act) compliant
- Data hosted in India
- 99.9% uptime SLA
- End-to-end encrypted messaging
- Accessible on Web, Android, and iOS

---

## Founders

### Apurav Agarwal — Co-Founder & CEO
Leads institutional strategy, partnerships, operational growth, and platform direction. His work focuses on building infrastructure that simplifies how schools communicate and coordinate on a daily basis.

### Lakshya Kumar — Co-Founder, Director & CTO
Architects HermesWorkspace's backend infrastructure, real-time communication systems, and platform scalability. His engineering philosophy centers around building systems that remain operationally invisible while maintaining high performance.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: How can schools get started with HermesWorkspace?**  
A: Schools contact HermesWorkspace through the inquiry form at hermesworkspace.com/contact. The team provides onboarding assistance, platform setup guidance, and a live demo.

**Q: Does HermesWorkspace replace WhatsApp for school communication?**  
A: Yes. HermesWorkspace is specifically designed to replace informal WhatsApp groups with structured, role-based institutional channels that give administrators visibility and control over school communication.

**Q: Is HermesWorkspace available for government schools?**  
A: Yes. HermesWorkspace supports CBSE, ICSE, and all State Board affiliated schools, including government and government-aided institutions.

**Q: What devices does HermesWorkspace support?**  
A: HermesWorkspace is available on web browsers (all major browsers), Android, and iOS.

**Q: How long does onboarding take?**  
A: Most schools can import their student, teacher, and parent database and launch their first channels within a single working day.

**Q: Is there a free trial?**  
A: HermesWorkspace offers a free guided demo for qualifying institutions. Reach out at connect@hermesworkspace.com or through the contact form.

**Q: Where is HermesWorkspace data stored?**  
A: All data is stored on cloud infrastructure hosted in India, in compliance with DPDPA requirements.

---

## Competitive Context

HermesWorkspace competes in the Indian school communication and ERP space against:
- **Google Classroom** — limited to academics, no institutional communication
- **Microsoft Teams for Education** — complex, expensive, not India-first
- **WhatsApp Business** — no role separation, no admin visibility, not institutional-grade
- **Legacy school ERP systems** — outdated UI, no real-time communication, no mobile-first design

HermesWorkspace differentiates through its India-first design, unified communication + management platform approach, and focus on operational simplicity for non-technical school staff.

---

- **General Support:** support@hermesworkspace.com  
- **Institutional Partnerships:** connect@hermesworkspace.com  
- **Website:** https://hermesworkspace.com  
- **Demo Request:** https://hermesworkspace.com/contact  
- **Response Time:** Initial response within 2 academic hours; full resolution within 1 business day
